calendar.matters:
SETTING OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR CHANGE OF GENDER AND ISSUANCE OF NEW BIRTH CERTIFICATE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing Gender Change and Issuance of New Birth Certificate.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Petitioner Nicki Green present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.
Proof of Publication and Declaration of Sworn Physician on file.

No objections to the gender change were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations of the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Gender change from male to female and issuance of New Birth Certificate.
Decree changing Gender and issuing New Birth Certificate signed by the court.
